who: medical billing clerks in small medical clinics processing 5–15 patient intake forms/month
offer: For medical billing clerks in small medical clinics processing 5–15 patient intake forms/month, inefficient manual data entry causes billing delays. We automate the conversion of paper forms into compliant submissions instead of manual data entry and paper filing.
problem: Converting paper patient intake forms into compliant billing submissions is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing clerks
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing clerks with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface and form scanning capability on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
